name: Deploy to Environment
description: Build, test, and deploy the application to a target environment with environment-specific guards
steps: Run npm test to confirm all tests pass

then: Run npm run build to create a production artifact
Request peer review approval before continuing
Tag the release commit with the version number
Deploy artifact to production using the deploy script
else: Deploy artifact to staging using the deploy script

then: Verify the deployment by checking the health endpoint
else: Report failing tests to the user and stop — do not deploy until tests are green
